characters.name: 林雷
characters.appearance: a young boy with short black hair, round face, wearing simple cloth clothes and leather boots

scenes.narration: 乌山镇位于魔兽山脉西侧，是芬莱王国中一个平凡却充满生机的小镇。
scenes.visual_prompt: wide shot of a small town surrounded by mountains at sunrise, smoke rising from chimneys, soft golden light over wooden houses

scenes.narration: 清晨的阳光洒落，小镇渐渐苏醒，居民们开始了一天的劳作。
scenes.visual_prompt: medium shot of townspeople walking on dirt paths, carrying tools, opening shop doors, morning mist still lingering

scenes.narration: 连六七岁的孩子也早早起床，在空地上进行晨练。
scenes.visual_prompt: low angle shot of young children running barefoot on a grassy field, breathing visible in the cool morning air

scenes.narration: 东边空地旁大树斑驳的树影下，上百名孩子整齐列队。
scenes.visual_prompt: aerial view of a large open ground with three groups of children arranged in rows, dappled sunlight filtering through leaves

scenes.narration: 最北边是六到八岁的孩童，神情认真地站着。
scenes.visual_prompt: close-up of young boys and girls in the northern group, standing straight, faces serious, hands at their sides

scenes.narration: 中间一队九到十二岁，已显少年模样。
scenes.visual_prompt: medium shot of older children in the middle group, taller and more built, eyes focused ahead, morning light on their faces

scenes.narration: 南边则是十三到十六岁的少年，身姿挺拔。
scenes.visual_prompt: side profile shot of teenage boys and girls in the southern group, standing tall, shadows stretching on the ground

scenes.narration: 三名壮硕教头站在队伍前方，身穿短背心与粗布裤。
scenes.visual_prompt: front view of three muscular middle-aged men standing in front of the children, arms crossed, wearing sleeveless vests and cotton pants
